title: Soulection All Day 2021
content:
**🎊🌟 Happy New Year 2021 🌟🎊**

A day of exclusive mixes from [Joe Kay](/episodes/all-day-2021/#joe-kays-set), [Austin Marc](/episodes/all-day-2021/#austin-marcs-set), [Minzi Roberta](/episodes/all-day-2021/#minzi-robertas-set), and [See Dee](/episodes/all-day-2021/#see-dees-set).

<!--more-->

#### Jump to:

- [Joe Kay's Set](/episodes/all-day-2021/#joe-kays-set) - Los Angeles 🇺🇸
- [Austin Marc](/episodes/all-day-2021/#austin-marcs-set) - New York 🇺🇸
- [Minzi Roberta](/episodes/all-day-2021/#minzi-robertas-set) - Toronto 🇨🇦
- [See Dee](/episodes/all-day-2021/#see-dees-set) - Paris 🇫🇷


Also listen to [Soulection All Day 2020](/episodes/all-day-2020/), or [Soulection All Day 2019](/episodes/all-day-2019/).

chapters.title: Austin Marc's Set
chapters.content:
Listen to this mix on [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/gb/station/soulection-all-day-austin-marc/ra.1546297819?at=1010lMz4) or [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/soulection/soulection-all-day-2021-austin-marc?in=soulection/sets/soulection-all-day)

Austin Marc delivers an exclusive mix to bring in 2021 from New York 🇺🇸.

Discover Austin Marc: [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/austinmarc) | [Bandcamp](https://austinmarc.bandcamp.com/) | [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/38pZZmocTPfCj0Uf2pCWQZ?si=2XD3IedeRGqaXALkw7Cjlg) | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/austinmarc/) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/austinmarctr)
